---
applyTo: "**/*.cs, **/*.csproj, **/*.cshtml"
---

# BC → ADR Quick Map

> Read the governing ADR **before** editing any BC. Use `docs/adr/<NNNN>/README.md` as entry point.

`AccountProfile`→0005 | `Catalog`→0007 | `Currencies`→0008 | `TimeManagement`→0009 | `Communication`→0018 | `Inventory`→0011 | `Presale`→0012 | `Orders`→0014 | `Payments`→0015 | `Coupons`→0016 | `Fulfillment`→0017 | `Identity/IAM`→0019 | `Backoffice`→0020 | `Web`→0021,0022,0023 | `Web routing`→0024 | `API`→0025 | `Saga`→0026

Tech/structure→0001,0003,0004 | Migration→0002 | Shared primitives→0006 | Per-BC DbContext→0013 | Message broker→0010
